item.title: We R Memory Keepers - AMERICAN CRAFTS Foil Quill Freestyle Pen All-In-One Kit-DIY Crafting Tool-Pack of 7 Multicolor Talla Única
item.description:
Tienes We R Memory Keepers - AMERICAN CRAFTS Foil Quill Freestyle Pen All-In-One Kit-DIY Crafting Tool-Pack of 7 Multicolor Talla Única aqui!

🔎:

  • E to use - plug The pens Power cord and your Pen will begin heating up; touch The Pen tip when You begin adding Foil to your crafts, DIY artworks, and even Home decorations
  • Premium-grade construcción - manufactured by american crafts using premium-grade materials; its STURDY structure is ensured to Last over Time, delivering maximized functionality and longevity
  • Versatile Tool - Doodle and create designs of different Styles and drawings Easily add Foil on paper, cardstock, photographs, chipboard, vellum, Glass, Leather, Wood, fabric, ribbon, chalkboard, Slate, plástico and acetate
  • Battery-operated - WITH the use of a portable USB battery pack, You can Foil whenever You want to Its astounding movability enables You to Foil a Wide Range of art-filled tasks and huge amounts of VARIOUS materials
  • Guarantee Safety - This Pen has a Heat Resistance Grip a The end of the barrel, to help You create perfectly different artworks without burning your Hand

🛒 Comprar!!!
